# Together Tech

Together Tech is a leading IT Services & Custom Software Development Company based in Chennai, India. We deliver premium websites, mobile apps, custom CRM/ERP portals, digital marketing campaigns, and UI/UX design.

## Contact Information
- **Website:** https://www.togethertechgroups.in
- **Email:** togethertechgroups@gmail.com
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +91 90475 49682
- **Address:** voc street, abith colony, industrial area, saidapet, chennai, tamil nadu
- **Hours:** Monday - Saturday, 09:00 AM - 07:00 PM IST

## Core Services
1. **Website Development:** Semantically clean, fast, and SEO-optimized business websites, portfolios, and e-commerce platforms.
2. **Software Development:** Custom CRM systems, ERP dashboards, billing systems, and retail applications with offline synchronization.
3. **Mobile App Development:** Cross-platform iOS and Android apps compiled with Flutter and native tech stacks.
4. **UI/UX Design:** Figma wireframing, user journeys, responsive prototyping, and branding kit compilation.
5. **SEO & Digital Marketing:** Google Ads, Meta Ads, Local Business SEO, and technical site performance optimization.

## Page Directory
- [Homepage](https://www.togethertechgroups.in/) - Main branding page and summary of works, testimonials, packages, and services.
- [Services](https://www.togethertechgroups.in/services) - Comprehensive list of digital offerings and technical capabilities.
- [About Us](https://www.togethertechgroups.in/about) - Agency background, founder values, team bios, and skills.
- [Portfolio](https://www.togethertechgroups.in/portfolio) - Showcase of completed client projects categorized by design type.
- [Pricing Packages](https://www.togethertechgroups.in/packages) - Transparent cost breakdown for custom sites, software, and marketing packages.
- [Contact Us](https://www.togethertechgroups.in/contact) - Contact form and support channels.
- [Blog](https://www.togethertechgroups.in/blog) - Recent industry updates, tech tutorials, and insights.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.togethertechgroups.in/privacy) - Privacy policies, data retention, and terms.
- [Terms of Service](https://www.togethertechgroups.in/terms) - Standard service terms and agreement rules.
